tactical_shape: Four changes from the 4-0 hammering against Japan
Defended poorly in the first 10 minutes
No stable structure described beyond struggling defensively and from set pieces
standout_players: Ismaël Gharbi spurned a brilliant early chance
Hazem Mastouri created the early chance for Gharbi
Anis Ben Slimane could have scored with his header
Hannibal Mejbri delivered the corner for Mastouri’s header
home_read.momentum: A sorry performance and heavy group-stage damage leave Tunisia heading home with a goal difference of minus 10.

tactical_shape: Comfortable in possession and control after the early opener
Used set pieces effectively, with goals from a free-kick and corners
standout_players: Frenkie de Jong ran the show again
Denzel Dumfries provided the dangerous cross that forced the own goal
Brian Brobbey scored from Virgil van Dijk’s free-kick delivery
Virgil van Dijk picked out Brobbey with the set piece
Jan Paul van Hecke scored from a corner
Tijjani Reijnders hit a delightful chip off the crossbar
Memphis Depay almost produced a late acrobatic finish
fatigue_injuries: Missing Micky van de Ven and Crysencio Summerville after yellow cards in previous matches
away_read.momentum: Top spot secured, but Koeman warned they got too comfortable and must improve for a much tougher last-32 meeting with Morocco.
